jeremyText="Just shoot it down." chaoText="Eaten Ability: DRILL SHOT#Power: 30 (DPS: 100)#Fire Rate: 3.3/sec#It starts slow, but then gains some decent speed. It doesn't have all that much going for it other than raw power, but that's not too bad in some situations. It also fires through rocks!" devText="N/A"
